title: abama occidentalis
intro: Abama occidentalis, also known as the "Gamboge Tree", is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia and Africa, characterized by its bright yellow resinous sap. The medicinal properties of Abama occidentalis are attributed to its resinous sap, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Abama occidentalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and treat fever. The herbal preparations of Abama occidentalis include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
